whyNative.title: Why Native AI Architecture?
whyNative.subtitle: Traditional 'patch-on' AI can't solve structural efficiency problems. Only business flows redesigned from the ground up can fully unleash machine potential.
whyNative.description: We go deep into every business touchpoint, rewire data flows, and build next-gen business loops designed for AI-native thinking.
whyNative.globalEdge: Global edge deployment ensures AI logic executes closest to your users, with the fluidity of a local app.
whyNative.compliance: Private deployment and data masking keep core IP assets within your borders, fully controlled.

team.label: TEAM
team.title: Battle-Hardened Super Individuals
team.description: We are not an outsourcing platform or a people-stacked corporation. Our core team blends three rare backgrounds: veteran enterprise service experts, AI-product-building CTOs, and AI engineers from top tech companies. Business × Product × Engineering — missing any one is why most AI projects fail.

members.name: Senior Enterprise Service Expert
members.description: Over a decade in enterprise services, deeply serving manufacturing, retail, and finance clients. Expert at identifying real pain points in chaotic business environments and designing systems that solve them.

members.name: AI Technical Lead
members.description: A hybrid AI expert from Silicon Valley — former AWS engineer and Tencent Cloud PM, spanning engineering and product. MS in Data Science from Rice University. Deep expertise in LLM applications and AI agent development — not just using AI, but embedding it into real business for lasting value.

members.name: FDE Specialist
members.description: Master's from Fudan University, from a top Chinese tech company's AI infrastructure team. Experience in large-scale model training, inference optimization, and Agentic system engineering — not a toy demo, but a real product running stably in production.

members.name: AI Security Advisor
members.description: Security expert from Alibaba and founder of a security startup. Deep expertise in AI agent security and enterprise security practices. We put 'security' and 'usability' on equal footing: from data compliance and permission boundaries to controllable Agent behavior, every AI product is vetted through a security lens before deployment, giving you peace of mind to embrace AI.

process.label: FDE · Forward Deployed Engineer
process.title: The People Who Make AI Actually Work for You
process.description: Bosses know the pain points but not how AI helps; engineers have the skills but can't translate to business value. This gap is why FDEs exist — understanding both business logic and AI systems, bridging the two for real output.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.description: Identify the most impactful technical problems and data status.

steps.title: Break Down
steps.description: Prioritize: must-do / can-wait / skip — protect your budget.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: AI-accelerated delivery of maintainable, scalable versions.

steps.title: Iterate
steps.description: Continuous upgrades based on real usage feedback.

sections.title: I. Information We Collect
sections.content: When you fill out the AI diagnosis questionnaire or contact us, we may collect information you voluntarily provide, including: contact information (name, company name, position, phone number, email); business information (industry, company size, workflow pain points, existing systems and tools, budget and timeline); and other content you voluntarily provide in supplementary notes.

sections.title: II. Use of Information
sections.content: We use your information only for: FDE team to contact you and provide AI diagnosis recommendations and solutions; improving our services and products; and when required by law or with your separate authorization. We will not use your personal information for purposes unrelated to the above.

sections.title: III. Information Storage and Security
sections.content: Data is transmitted via HTTPS encryption; information is stored in access-controlled server databases accessible only by authorized personnel; we employ reasonable technical and administrative measures to prevent unauthorized access, disclosure, or tampering.

sections.title: IV. Information Sharing and Disclosure
sections.content: We will not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties except: with your explicit prior consent; when necessary to fulfill the service you request, with the recipient bound by confidentiality obligations; or as required by laws, regulations, or legitimate requests from regulatory or judicial authorities.

sections.title: V. Cookies and Similar Technologies
sections.content: This website only uses cookies for necessary scenarios such as admin login and language preferences to maintain session and settings state, not for cross-site advertising tracking.

sections.title: VI. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your submitted personal information. To exercise these rights, please contact us via the email below. We will process your request within a reasonable period.

sections.title: VII. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact: sales@rustyflow.ai

sections.title: VIII. Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with the last updated date. Material changes will be notified through appropriate means.

sections.title: I. Service Description
sections.content: We provide enterprise AI deployment consulting and delivery services, including but not limited to AI diagnosis, system refactoring and development, and Agent Collaboration Platform. The "Free AI Diagnosis" on this website is for understanding requirements before formal cooperation and does not constitute any form of service commitment or contract.

sections.title: II. Usage Guidelines
sections.content: You agree to: use this website for lawful and legitimate purposes; submit true, accurate, and complete information; and not engage in any conduct that compromises website security, interferes with normal operations, or infringes upon the legal rights of others.

sections.title: III. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The intellectual property rights of all content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, interface design, and code, belong to Dahu. No one may reproduce, use, or distribute them without written permission.

sections.title: IV. Disclaimer
sections.content: The information on this website is for reference only. To the extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use this website and its services.

sections.title: V. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, our liability for this website and services shall be limited to the fees you actually paid for the relevant services. For free content and services, we assume no liability for damages.

sections.title: VI. Governing Law
sections.content: The establishment, interpretation, and dispute resolution of these terms shall be governed by the laws of New Zealand. Any disputes shall be resolved through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, the dispute shall be submitted to the competent people's court in our jurisdiction.

sections.title: VII. Contact Information
sections.content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact: sales@rustyflow.ai

sections.title: VIII. Terms Updates
sections.content: We reserve the right to revise these terms at any time. Updated terms will take effect immediately upon posting on this page. Please check periodically.
